nodes.name: 🔔 Webhook — Generate Mockups (called by WF02C)
nodes.notes: Receives PDF data from WF02C. Generates 6-10 professional listing images for Etsy. Returns array of image URLs. Triggers WF03 for publishing after completion.

parameters.command:
=# Setup mockup directory and install Python dependencies
mkdir -p '{{ $json.product.mockup_dir }}'

# Install Pillow if not present
python3 -c "import PIL" 2>/dev/null || pip3 install Pillow --break-system-packages --quiet

# Install requests if not present  
python3 -c "import requests" 2>/dev/null || pip3 install requests --break-system-packages --quiet

# Check wkhtmltoimage for page previews
which wkhtmltoimage && echo 'wkhtmltoimage ready' || echo 'wkhtmltoimage not found - will skip page previews'

# Download first 3 pages of PDF as images for preview mockups
# Requires poppler-utils: apt-get install -y poppler-utils
PDF_PATH='{{ $json.product.pdf_path }}'
OUTPUT_DIR='{{ $json.product.mockup_dir }}'

if [ -f "$PDF_PATH" ]; then
  pdftoppm -r 150 -l 3 -png "$PDF_PATH" "$OUTPUT_DIR/page" 2>&1
  echo "Page images extracted"
  ls "$OUTPUT_DIR"/*.png 2>/dev/null | head -5
else
  echo "PDF not on local disk — skipping page extraction"
  echo "PDF URL: {{ $json.product.pdf_url }}"
fi

echo 'SETUP_COMPLETE'

=python3 << 'PYEOF'
import os
import sys
from PIL import Image, ImageDraw, ImageFont
import textwrap
import json

# ── CONFIG ────────────────────────────────────────────────
PRODUCT_ID    = '{{ $json.product.id }}'
PRODUCT_TITLE = '{{ $json.product.title }}'
PRODUCT_TYPE  = '{{ $json.product.type }}'
PAGE_COUNT    = {{ $json.product.page_count }}
BRAND         = '{{ $json.product.brand }}'
WEBSITE       = '{{ $json.product.website }}'
MOCKUP_DIR    = '{{ $json.product.mockup_dir }}'
PAGES         = {{ JSON.stringify($json.product.pages) }}

# Brand colors (RGB)
PRIMARY  = (27, 42, 74)    # #1B2A4A navy
ACCENT   = (201, 168, 76)  # #C9A84C gold
WHITE    = (255, 255, 255)
LIGHT_BG = (248, 249, 250)
TEXT     = (44, 44, 44)
GREY     = (150, 150, 150)

# Etsy recommended: 2000x2000 or 3000x2250
W, H = 2000, 2000

os.makedirs(MOCKUP_DIR, exist_ok=True)

def get_font(size, bold=False):
    """Get font — fall back to default if custom not available"""
    font_paths = [
        f'/usr/share/fonts/truetype/dejavu/DejaVuSans{"Bold" if bold else ""}.ttf',
        f'/usr/share/fonts/truetype/liberation/LiberationSans-{"Bold" if bold else "Regular"}.ttf',
        '/usr/share/fonts/truetype/dejavu/DejaVuSans.ttf',
    ]
    for path in font_paths:
        if os.path.exists(path):
            try:
                return ImageFont.truetype(path, size)
            except:
                continue
    return ImageFont.load_default()

def draw_wrapped_text(draw, text, font, max_width, x, y, fill, line_spacing=1.3):
    """Draw text with word wrapping. Returns final y position."""
    words = text.split()
    lines = []
    current_line = []
    
    for word in words:
        test_line = ' '.join(current_line + [word])
        bbox = draw.textbbox((0, 0), test_line, font=font)
        if bbox[2] - bbox[0] <= max_width:
            current_line.append(word)
        else:
            if current_line:
                lines.append(' '.join(current_line))
            current_line = [word]
    if current_line:
        lines.append(' '.join(current_line))
    
    for line in lines:
        draw.text((x, y), line, font=font, fill=fill)
        bbox = draw.textbbox((0, 0), line, font=font)
        y += int((bbox[3] - bbox[1]) * line_spacing)
    return y

# ── MOCKUP 1: HERO IMAGE ──────────────────────────────────
print('Generating Hero mockup...')
img = Image.new('RGB', (W, H), LIGHT_BG)
draw = ImageDraw.Draw(img)

# Navy top bar
draw.rectangle([0, 0, W, 200], fill=PRIMARY)
# Gold accent line
draw.rectangle([0, 200, W, 216], fill=ACCENT)

# Brand name in top bar
brand_font = get_font(52, bold=True)
draw.text((80, 70), BRAND, font=brand_font, fill=WHITE)

# Main title area — centered
title_font = get_font(88, bold=True)
subtitle_font = get_font(48)

# Title (centered, with word wrap)
max_w = W - 160
title_bbox = draw.textbbox((0, 0), PRODUCT_TITLE, font=title_font)
title_h = title_bbox[3] - title_bbox[1]

# Center vertically in middle section
center_y = 380
draw_wrapped_text(draw, PRODUCT_TITLE, title_font, max_w, 80, center_y, PRIMARY, 1.2)

# Gold divider
draw.rectangle([80, center_y + title_h + 80, W - 80, center_y + title_h + 86], fill=ACCENT)

# Product type subtitle
type_labels = {
    'weekly_planner': 'Weekly Planner — Printable PDF',
    'daily_planner': 'Daily Planner — Printable PDF',
    'goal_tracker': 'Goal Tracker — Printable PDF',
    'habit_tracker': 'Habit Tracker — Printable PDF',
    'client_tracker': 'Client Tracker — Printable PDF',
    'content_calendar': 'Content Calendar — Printable PDF',
    'budget_planner': 'Budget Planner — Printable PDF',
}
subtitle = type_labels.get(PRODUCT_TYPE, 'Printable PDF Planner')
draw.text((80, center_y + title_h + 120), subtitle, font=subtitle_font, fill=GREY)

# Page count badge
badge_text = f'{PAGE_COUNT} Pages  ·  A4 Size  ·  Instant Download'
badge_font = get_font(40)
draw.text((80, center_y + title_h + 200), badge_text, font=badge_font, fill=TEXT)

# Bottom navy bar
draw.rectangle([0, H - 140, W, H], fill=PRIMARY)
draw.text((80, H - 90), WEBSITE, font=get_font(44), fill=ACCENT)

img.save(f'{MOCKUP_DIR}/01_hero.png', 'PNG', quality=95)
print(f'  Saved: 01_hero.png')


# ── MOCKUP 2: WHAT'S INCLUDED ─────────────────────────────
print('Generating Whats Included mockup...')
img = Image.new('RGB', (W, H), WHITE)
draw = ImageDraw.Draw(img)

# Header
draw.rectangle([0, 0, W, 240], fill=PRIMARY)
draw.rectangle([0, 240, W, 256], fill=ACCENT)
draw.text((80, 80), "What's Included", font=get_font(72, bold=True), fill=WHITE)

# List items from pages breakdown
items = PAGES if PAGES else [
    f'{PAGE_COUNT} printable pages',
    'Cover page',
    'Monthly overview pages',
    'Weekly planner spreads',
    'Notes pages',
    'A4 size — print at home or office',
    'PDF format — instant download',
]

y = 320
item_font = get_font(52)
check_font = get_font(60, bold=True)

for item in items[:8]:  # Max 8 items
    # Gold checkmark
    draw.text((80, y), '✓', font=check_font, fill=ACCENT)
    draw.text((160, y + 6), str(item), font=item_font, fill=TEXT)
    y += 100
    # Divider
    draw.rectangle([80, y - 20, W - 80, y - 18], fill=LIGHT_BG)

# Bottom bar
draw.rectangle([0, H - 140, W, H], fill=PRIMARY)
draw.text((80, H - 90), f'{BRAND}  ·  {WEBSITE}', font=get_font(40), fill=ACCENT)

img.save(f'{MOCKUP_DIR}/04_whats_included.png', 'PNG', quality=95)
print(f'  Saved: 04_whats_included.png')


# ── MOCKUP 3: HOW TO USE (3 STEPS) ───────────────────────
print('Generating How To Use mockup...')
img = Image.new('RGB', (W, H), LIGHT_BG)
draw = ImageDraw.Draw(img)

# Header
draw.rectangle([0, 0, W, 200], fill=PRIMARY)
draw.rectangle([0, 200, W, 214], fill=ACCENT)
draw.text((80, 68), 'How To Use', font=get_font(72, bold=True), fill=WHITE)

steps = [
    ('01', 'Purchase & Download', 'Complete your purchase and download the PDF file instantly to your device.'),
    ('02', 'Print at Home', 'Print on standard A4 paper using any home or office printer. Works in black and white too.'),
    ('03', 'Start Planning', 'Grab a pen and start. Your system is ready on day one.'),
]

y = 280
for num, title, desc in steps:
    # Step circle
    draw.ellipse([80, y, 200, y + 120], fill=PRIMARY)
    draw.text((112 if len(num) == 2 else 125, y + 28), num, font=get_font(56, bold=True), fill=ACCENT)
    
    # Step content
    draw.text((240, y + 10), title, font=get_font(58, bold=True), fill=PRIMARY)
    draw_wrapped_text(draw, desc, get_font(42), W - 320, 240, y + 82, GREY)
    
    y += 220
    draw.rectangle([80, y - 30, W - 80, y - 28], fill=ACCENT)

# Bottom bar
draw.rectangle([0, H - 140, W, H], fill=PRIMARY)
draw.text((80, H - 90), f'{BRAND}  ·  {WEBSITE}', font=get_font(40), fill=ACCENT)

img.save(f'{MOCKUP_DIR}/05_how_to_use.png', 'PNG', quality=95)
print(f'  Saved: 05_how_to_use.png')


# ── MOCKUP 4: INSTANT DOWNLOAD TRUST BADGE ───────────────
print('Generating Trust Badge mockup...')
img = Image.new('RGB', (W, H), PRIMARY)
draw = ImageDraw.Draw(img)

# Central content
center_x = W // 2

# Large down-arrow icon (CSS-style using rectangles)
arrow_y = 320
draw.rectangle([center_x - 20, arrow_y, center_x + 20, arrow_y + 160], fill=ACCENT)
draw.polygon([
    (center_x - 80, arrow_y + 160),
    (center_x + 80, arrow_y + 160),
    (center_x, arrow_y + 280)
], fill=ACCENT)

# Text
title_font = get_font(96, bold=True)
subtitle_font = get_font(52)
small_font = get_font(40)

title = 'INSTANT DOWNLOAD'
tbbox = draw.textbbox((0, 0), title, font=title_font)
tx = (W - (tbbox[2] - tbbox[0])) // 2
draw.text((tx, 680), title, font=title_font, fill=WHITE)

sub = 'Available immediately after purchase'
sbbox = draw.textbbox((0, 0), sub, font=subtitle_font)
sx = (W - (sbbox[2] - sbbox[0])) // 2
draw.text((sx, 820), sub, font=subtitle_font, fill=ACCENT)

# Format details
details = ['PDF Format', 'A4 Size', 'Print Ready', 'Commercial Use: Personal Only']
dy = 980
for detail in details:
    dbbox = draw.textbbox((0, 0), detail, font=small_font)
    dx = (W - (dbbox[2] - dbbox[0])) // 2
    draw.text((dx, dy), detail, font=small_font, fill=(180, 190, 210))
    dy += 70

# Bottom
draw.rectangle([0, H - 140, W, H], fill=(15, 25, 55))
draw.text((80, H - 90), f'{BRAND}  ·  {WEBSITE}', font=get_font(40), fill=ACCENT)

img.save(f'{MOCKUP_DIR}/09_instant_download.png', 'PNG', quality=95)
print(f'  Saved: 09_instant_download.png')


# ── MOCKUP 5: BRAND CLOSER ────────────────────────────────
print('Generating Brand Closer mockup...')
img = Image.new('RGB', (W, H), LIGHT_BG)
draw = ImageDraw.Draw(img)

# Full navy background with gold accents
draw.rectangle([0, 0, W, H], fill=PRIMARY)
draw.rectangle([0, 0, 12, H], fill=ACCENT)  # Left border
draw.rectangle([W - 12, 0, W, H], fill=ACCENT)  # Right border
draw.rectangle([0, 0, W, 12], fill=ACCENT)  # Top border
draw.rectangle([0, H - 12, W, H], fill=ACCENT)  # Bottom border

# Center content
brand_font = get_font(110, bold=True)
tag_font = get_font(52)
small_font = get_font(40)

brand_bbox = draw.textbbox((0, 0), BRAND, font=brand_font)
bx = (W - (brand_bbox[2] - brand_bbox[0])) // 2
draw.text((bx, 680), BRAND, font=brand_font, fill=WHITE)

# Gold divider
draw.rectangle([200, 840, W - 200, 856], fill=ACCENT)

tagline = 'Tools that clear your mind and build your future.'
tbbox = draw.textbbox((0, 0), tagline, font=tag_font)
tx = (W - (tbbox[2] - tbbox[0])) // 2
draw.text((tx, 900), tagline, font=tag_font, fill=ACCENT)

wbbox = draw.textbbox((0, 0), WEBSITE, font=small_font)
wx = (W - (wbbox[2] - wbbox[0])) // 2
draw.text((wx, 1020), WEBSITE, font=small_font, fill=(150, 165, 195))

img.save(f'{MOCKUP_DIR}/10_brand_closer.png', 'PNG', quality=95)
print(f'  Saved: 10_brand_closer.png')


# ── SUMMARY ───────────────────────────────────────────────
print('\nMockup generation complete.')
generated = [f for f in os.listdir(MOCKUP_DIR) if f.endswith('.png')]
print(f'Generated {len(generated)} mockups:')
for f in sorted(generated):
    size = os.path.getsize(f'{MOCKUP_DIR}/{f}')
    print(f'  {f}: {size:,} bytes')

print('GENERATION_COMPLETE')
PYEOF

nodes.name: 🎨 Python — Generate Mockup Images
nodes.notes: Generates 5 core mockups using Python Pillow: Hero, Whats Included, How To Use, Instant Download, Brand Closer. Pure Python, zero external APIs, zero cost. Each mockup is 2000x2000px PNG optimized for Etsy. Processing time: 30-90 seconds.

parameters.command:
=# Attempt to generate page preview mockup from extracted PDF pages
# These use actual planner pages as preview images

MOCKUP_DIR='{{ $json.product.mockup_dir }}'
PRODUCT_ID='{{ $json.product.id }}'

# Check if page images were extracted
PAGE_FILES=$(ls "$MOCKUP_DIR"/page-*.png 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
echo "Found $PAGE_FILES extracted page images"

if [ "$PAGE_FILES" -gt 0 ]; then
  python3 << 'PYEOF'
import os
from PIL import Image, ImageDraw, ImageFont
import glob

MOCKUP_DIR = os.environ.get('MOCKUP_DIR', '{{ $json.product.mockup_dir }}')
W, H = 2000, 2000
PRIMARY = (27, 42, 74)
ACCENT = (201, 168, 76)
WHITE = (255, 255, 255)
LIGHT_BG = (248, 249, 250)

# Get extracted page images
page_files = sorted(glob.glob(f'{MOCKUP_DIR}/page-*.png'))[:3]

if page_files:
    # Create spread mockup showing 2 pages side by side
    img = Image.new('RGB', (W, H), LIGHT_BG)
    draw = ImageDraw.Draw(img)
    
    # Header
    draw.rectangle([0, 0, W, 160], fill=PRIMARY)
    draw.rectangle([0, 160, W, 172], fill=ACCENT)
    
    font = ImageFont.load_default()
    # Load page images and place them
    if len(page_files) >= 2:
        # Two-page spread
        p1 = Image.open(page_files[0]).convert('RGB')
        p2 = Image.open(page_files[1]).convert('RGB')
        
        spread_w = (W - 120) // 2
        spread_h = int(spread_w * 1.414)  # A4 ratio
        if spread_h > H - 280:
            spread_h = H - 280
            spread_w = int(spread_h / 1.414)
        
        p1 = p1.resize((spread_w, spread_h), Image.LANCZOS)
        p2 = p2.resize((spread_w, spread_h), Image.LANCZOS)
        
        y_offset = 200
        img.paste(p1, (40, y_offset))
        img.paste(p2, (60 + spread_w, y_offset))
        
    elif len(page_files) == 1:
        p1 = Image.open(page_files[0]).convert('RGB')
        pw = int((W - 200) * 0.7)
        ph = int(pw * 1.414)
        p1 = p1.resize((pw, ph), Image.LANCZOS)
        img.paste(p1, ((W - pw) // 2, 200))
    
    # Bottom bar
    draw.rectangle([0, H - 120, W, H], fill=PRIMARY)
    
    img.save(f'{MOCKUP_DIR}/03_pages_preview.png', 'PNG', quality=95)
    print('Page preview mockup saved: 03_pages_preview.png')
    print('PREVIEW_GENERATED=true')
PYEOF
else
  echo 'No page images available — skipping page preview'
  echo 'PREVIEW_GENERATED=false'
  # Create a placeholder pages preview
  python3 -c "
from PIL import Image, ImageDraw
import os
W, H = 2000, 2000
img = Image.new('RGB', (W, H), (248, 249, 250))
draw = ImageDraw.Draw(img)
draw.rectangle([0, 0, W, 160], fill=(27, 42, 74))
draw.rectangle([0, 160, W, 172], fill=(201, 168, 76))
# Simple page lines to suggest a planner
for y in range(250, H-150, 55):
    draw.rectangle([80, y, W-80, y+1], fill=(220, 220, 220))
draw.rectangle([0, H-120, W, H], fill=(27, 42, 74))
img.save('${MOCKUP_DIR}/03_pages_preview.png', 'PNG', quality=90)
print('Placeholder preview created')
"
fi

=# Upload all mockup images to R2/S3
MOCKUP_DIR='{{ $json.product.mockup_dir }}'
PRODUCT_ID='{{ $json.product.id }}'

echo "Uploading mockups from: $MOCKUP_DIR"

# Count mockups
MOCKUP_COUNT=$(ls "$MOCKUP_DIR"/*.png 2>/dev/null | wc -l)
echo "Found $MOCKUP_COUNT mockup images"

if [ "$MOCKUP_COUNT" -eq 0 ]; then
  echo 'ERROR: No mockup images found'
  exit 1
fi

# Upload to R2
rclone copy \
  "$MOCKUP_DIR" \
  "r2:clearstack-products/mockups/$PRODUCT_ID/" \
  --include '*.png' \
  --s3-acl public-read 2>&1

if [ $? -ne 0 ]; then
  echo 'R2 upload failed — using local nginx fallback'
  mkdir -p "/var/www/clearstack-downloads/mockups/$PRODUCT_ID"
  cp "$MOCKUP_DIR"/*.png "/var/www/clearstack-downloads/mockups/$PRODUCT_ID/"
  BASE_URL="https://clearstackstudio.com/downloads/mockups/$PRODUCT_ID"
else
  BASE_URL="https://pub-YOUR_R2_ACCOUNT_ID.r2.dev/mockups/$PRODUCT_ID"
fi

# Output all image URLs
echo "BASE_URL=$BASE_URL"
for f in $(ls "$MOCKUP_DIR"/*.png | sort); do
  FNAME=$(basename "$f")
  echo "MOCKUP_URL=${BASE_URL}/${FNAME}"
done

echo "TOTAL_MOCKUPS=$MOCKUP_COUNT"
echo 'UPLOAD_COMPLETE'

nodes.name: 🔌 Trigger WF03 — Publish Product
nodes.notes: Passes complete product data to WF03: PDF URL, all mockup URLs, product metadata. WF03 creates the Etsy listing with all 10 images, sets the digital download file, and publishes. The product goes live on Etsy within minutes.

parameters.command:
=# Cleanup temp files to prevent disk fill
# Keep PDFs and mockups in R2/S3, remove from local /tmp
rm -rf '{{ $json.product.mockup_dir }}'
rm -f '{{ $('⚙️ Plan Mockup Set').first().json.product.pdf_path }}'
echo 'Temp files cleaned up'
df -h /tmp

nodes.name: 🗑️ Cleanup Temp Files
nodes.notes: Removes temp files from /tmp after upload to R2. Critical for VPS disk management — WF09B video files plus PDF generation would fill 400GB SSD quickly without cleanup.

meta.description: WF13: Mockup Generator. Generates 5-6 professional Etsy listing images using Python Pillow — zero external APIs, zero cost. Images: Hero (clean product title on brand background), Whats Included (checklist), How To Use (3 steps), Page Preview (actual planner pages), Instant Download (trust badge), Brand Closer. 2000x2000px PNG, Etsy-optimized. Uploads to Cloudflare R2. Triggers WF03 to publish. Cleans up temp files.
vps_setup_required: apt-get install -y poppler-utils (for pdftoppm page extraction)
rclone configured with R2 remote named 'r2'
